steps.title: Use the visible sky clue
steps.content: The sun is already below the horizon, but it is described as <u>manifest</u> in the fire-colored streaks reaching upward in the sky. The word must mean that the sun can still be noticed through its visible effects.

steps.title: Choose the sensory meaning
steps.content: Choice A means decreasing. Choice B means achieved or understood. Choice C means located. The remaining choice means able to be perceived, matching the sun's indirect visibility in the streaks of light. The answer is D.
